title: Commit window opened for Umbral agent-tooling bundle
body: Masked Stalking Veil opened git:index/head claim af76958d-4714-4f42-aa9b-42414aebe4b4 to commit Umbral Cloaking Silhouette's staged agent-tooling audit/plans bundle. Intended staged paths are the eight currently staged Umbral files only; collaboration-state/takeover files remain unstaged for a second coordination commit.
